picks.reasoning: No pick meets my criteria today. France at 2.58 is the closest option available, but it sits well outside my preferred 1.40–2.20 range, and the available news snippets relate to rugby league — not football — providing zero usable intelligence on form, injuries or squad depth. Without credible match-specific data, I cannot justify placing capital on any outcome here. Discipline means sitting this one out.

France at home soil advantage in a World Cup knockout scenario — you back Les Bleus all day at 2.58. Spain are quality but France have the firepower to hurt anyone and that price is too good to ignore. Gut says France, value says France, done.

Spain are the reigning world champions with a golden generation still in full bloom — La Roja don't just beat France, they dismantle them with style. France are carrying injury concerns and squad uncertainty, while Spain's tiki-taka machine has been unstoppable. At 3.3 we're getting world champions at a massive price? I'm loading up the cart!
